How it worksUse casesAgents

Lead finder AI Agent

An agent that researches your ideal customer, finds matching companies and contacts every day, and delivers enriched, verified leads straight into your CRM — no prospecting hours required.

Book a free call

20-minute call · Live in days

What it does

An AI lead finder agent starts with your ideal customer profile — the industries, company sizes, roles, and signals that indicate a strong fit — and then goes to work finding real companies and contacts that match. It enriches each lead with contact details, company context, and intent signals, and pushes them into your CRM ready for outreach.

It's built for B2B teams who know who they want to sell to but don't have the time to research and source prospects manually. Instead of SDRs spending hours on LinkedIn and data tools, the agent runs that process daily in the background, delivering a consistent stream of warm, verified leads.

How it works

A pipeline that fills itself

01

Define your ICP

We configure the agent with your ideal customer profile — industry, company size, role, tech stack, and buying intent signals.

02

Research & find matches

The agent searches across data sources and the web, identifying companies and contacts that match your criteria daily.

03

Enrich & deliver to CRM

Leads are enriched with verified contact details and company context, then pushed into your CRM ready for outreach.

Works with

HubSpot
Salesforce
+ any CRM or outbound tool

How we build it

From brief to live agent — done for you

01

Discovery

You describe your ideal customer — industry, size, role, and any signals that indicate fit — in a short call.

02

Build & integrate

We configure the agent's search criteria and connect it to your CRM and data sources.

03

Deploy & host

The agent runs on a daily schedule on our infrastructure, continuously finding and enriching leads.

04

Monitor & improve

We tune the ICP criteria as you learn which leads convert, so quality improves over time.

Why build it with us

You don't manage a single thing

We handle the API costs

Data source access and model usage are bundled and managed on our side — no subscriptions or usage bills.

Custom integrations included

We connect the agent to your CRM and data sources — HubSpot, Salesforce, Apollo, and more.

Hosted & monitored for you

It runs on our infrastructure on a daily schedule, so your pipeline fills automatically.

Tuned to your ICP

We refine the search criteria as you learn which leads convert, so quality compounds over time.

FAQ

Common questions

What is an AI lead finder agent?

It's an AI agent that researches your ideal customer profile, finds matching companies and contacts from across the web and data sources, enriches each lead with verified contact details and company context, and delivers them into your CRM automatically — every day.

How does it find leads?

We configure the agent with your ICP criteria — industry, company size, role, tech stack, and intent signals. It then searches across data sources and the web to find companies and contacts that match, enriches the data, deduplicates against your existing records, and pushes verified leads into your CRM.

How is this different from buying a lead list?

Lead lists are static, unverified, and shared with everyone. This agent finds leads specific to your exact ICP, enriches them with current data, deduplicates against your pipeline, and delivers a fresh set every day — so you always have current, relevant prospects.

Which CRMs does it integrate with?

HubSpot and Salesforce out of the box. We can connect it to most CRMs and outbound tools — including Apollo, Outreach, and Pipedrive.

How long does it take to go live?

Most lead finder agents are live within days. After a short discovery call, we build, integrate, and deploy it for you — nothing to install on your side.

Do I need to manage AI accounts or data subscriptions?

No. We bundle and manage all data source access and model costs on our infrastructure. You get a working agent and a pipeline that fills itself — no subscriptions to manage.

Ready for your own lead finder agent?

Book a free 20-minute call. We'll tell you exactly what your agent can do and build it for you — API costs, integrations, and hosting included.
